root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.used_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_type_code FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_type_code ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
